ItacPersonItem.Notes: The son of Antonio, Nicolo` learnt the art of printing from Paolo Manuzio. He worked in Venice, and moved to Turin in 1572, when he was invited by Emanuele Filiberto to establish a printing press under his control.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
